---
title: "Step-by-Step Analysis Walkthrough"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Overview

This walkthrough shows how to run the analysis from start to finish.

# Step 1 — Load packages

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
```

# Step 2 — Import data

```{r}
df <- readRDS("data/example_data.rds")
glimpse(df)
```

# Step 3 — Clean variables

```{r}
df_clean <- df %>%
  mutate(GEOID = as.character(GEOID))
```

# Step 4 — Run analysis

```{r}
results <- df_clean %>%
  group_by(GEOID) %>%
  summarise(rate = sum(Count) / sum(POP_EST))
```

# Step 5 — Save output

```{r}
saveRDS(results, "outputs/results.rds")
```

# Interpretation

The final output is a tract-level rate table that can be mapped or used in later models.
